commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a per-agent SQLite session/transcript schema, generated Kysely types, SQLite accessor helpers, and shared conformance tests behind the existing session accessor seam while leaving runtime file-backed.

PR surface: Source +1799, Tests +1238, Generated +220. Total +3257 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows SQLite read helpers using the schema-creating opener and lifecycle cleanup deleting session rows under cascading transcript foreign keys; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide and verify the storage-retention/API gates and contributor proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane while the protected maintainer label and product-sensitive migration gates remain.
